para_trans: Regarding the design of the office of Maharashtra State Infrastructure Development Corporation, Limited (MSIDC).
Reference: - Department of Public Works, Government Decisions, Serial No. 19th November, 2025.

Government Corrigendum: - Statement of the office of "Maharashtra State Infrastructure Development Corporation, Limited" under the Public Works Department Government Decision, d. Approved as of November 19, 2025. The details of the sanctioned posts for the Corporation, Maharashtra State Infrastructure Development Corporation, Limited, Mumbai, as shown in Statement-A of the said figure were mentioned in the Government Decision in context. These include A.No. 7 to 90 as follows: -
The aforesaid statement is being amended as follows.
table_trans: Methods of working in the recruitment process

Since the construction works are being carried out by the Corporation, the FEN art of soap and soap should be given additional charge at present. Also, the sanctioned posts should not be admissible for promotion.
Required procedure in respect of recruitment
Regular full-time deputation will be made from the officers of the Public Works Department.

para_trans: 2. This Government Corrigendum Finance Department Executive Expenditure-11. As per the approval dated 04.03.2026
3. The Government Corrigendum to be made available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
